nombre équipes.question: How many film crews did you host in 2025?

nombre.question: How many 3D glasses do you have?

salles.question: Describe the different rooms in the cinema

stockage.question: How much data do you store in an external cloud?

nombre.question: How many hard drives do you have?

nombre films dématérialisés.description: By default, you can enter 90% of the total scheduled films (this number is available in your general data), which is the average value from Bilan Carbone® assessments carried out in several French cinemas. If you have more precise information for your cinema, we invite you to use it instead of the default value.
nombre films dématérialisés.question: How many films did you receive digitally this year?

proximité spectateurs.question: Are your spectators mainly "local" residents, i.e. living in the area year-round, or do you also attract a significant proportion of passing spectators (including tourists)?

options.zone très touristique: The cinema is located in a tourist area and 80% or more of spectators do not live near the cinema year-round.
options.zone moyennement touristique: The cinema is located in a weekend destination town and/or seaside resort attracting around 25% "non-local" spectators.
options.majoritairement locaux: The cinema mainly welcomes local spectators

profil établissement.question: If you wish to identify with comparable cinema profiles, which type of cinema does your establishment most closely resemble?

options.distances courtes: Spectators travel very short distances to come to the cinema (less than 10km round trip). Very few come by car (less than 10%) and the vast majority come on foot or by public transport.
options.distances moyennes: Spectators travel around 10 km round trip to come to the cinema. It is mainly a local audience, mostly coming by car. Around 25% come on foot.
options.distances longues: Spectators travel around 20-25 km round trip to come to the cinema. It is mainly a local audience, mostly coming by car. Around 25% come on foot.
options.majoritairement en voiture: More than 80% of spectators come by car. Few or none come by public transport, few come on foot. The average distance travelled is around 15 km round trip.
options.uniquement accessible en voiture: The cinema is only accessible by car.

précision.question: Have you already conducted a spectator mobility survey?

options.résultat précis: Yes, and I can enter the results
options.besoin: No, but I would like to do it to estimate the cinema's impact
options.estimation: No, but I prefer to identify with comparable cinema profiles

contact.question: If you wish to carry out a spectator mobility survey, you can send us an email to receive a survey template that will allow you to provide the requested information in a few weeks

collaborateurs.question: What is the work schedule of the cinema staff?

How many kWh from district heating were consumed by the cinema this year?
How many kWh from district cooling were consumed by the cinema this year?
How many kWh from wood pellet combustion were consumed by the cinema this year?

est équipé climatisation.question: Is your cinema equipped with air conditioning?

consommation.question: What is your annual diesel consumption?

équipement groupes électrogènes.question: Does the cinema have one or more generators?

options.utilisation régulière: Yes, and I use it several times a year
options.équipé sans utilisation: Yes, but I don't use it

déplacements.description: Business trips by your staff are all trips other than home-work journeys, made as part of their work. These include, for example, trips to congresses, conventions, festivals, previews, etc.
déplacements.question: Describe your staff's business trips

surface.question: What is the cinema's floor area? (The sum of the areas of the different levels)

autres travaux importants.question: Other major works (e.g. carpet replacement, facade renovation, painting, etc.)

aucun.question: I have not carried out any of these renovations in the last ten years

montant.question: If you have carried out a renovation in the last 10 years, what is the amount spent on these renovation works?

surface.question: If you have carried out an extension in the last 10 years, what is the additional surface area added?
What is the total surface area of the building (including the cinema)?

est partagé.question: Is the building shared with another activity?

parking présent.question: Does the cinema have a parking lot?

montant.question: How much did you spend on small office supplies? (Examples: pencil, ink cartridge, paper excluding programs, notebook, etc.)

montant.description: Services include, for example, cleaning, security, accounting, bank charges, etc. You can use a default value for this answer (€25,286), which comes from Bilan Carbone® assessments carried out in several French cinemas. If you have more precise information for your cinema, we invite you to use it instead of the default value.
montant.question: How much did you spend on services?

informatique.description: If the equipment concerned is purchased, please do not fill in the "Rental period" field. If the equipment is rented occasionally, please do not fill in the "Purchase date" field. If you rent equipment for long periods or continuously, we recommend that you consider it as purchased (from the date of the first year of rental).
informatique.question: For each of these IT devices, please indicate their number and their purchase date or rental period
